fa-binary.appearanceId: two vertical columns of zeroes and ones in a monospace arrangement; stacked digits alternating between zero and one
fa-binary.functionalityId: toggles or displays binary data representation; converts a value to binary number format
fa-binary.intentId: view or work with raw binary data; understand a value in binary notation

fa-binary-circle-check.appearanceId: columns of zeroes and ones alongside a circle containing a checkmark; binary digit arrangement paired with a confirmed tick inside a round badge
fa-binary-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms that binary data is valid or verified; marks a binary value as successfully checked
fa-binary-circle-check.intentId: validate that binary input or output is correct; confirm a binary operation completed successfully

fa-binary-lock.appearanceId: columns of zeroes and ones beside a padlock shape; stacked binary digits next to a closed lock silhouette
fa-binary-lock.functionalityId: indicates binary data is encrypted or access-restricted; locks a binary value or field from editing
fa-binary-lock.intentId: secure or encrypt binary data; prevent modification of a binary value

fa-binary-slash.appearanceId: columns of zeroes and ones crossed by a diagonal slash line; binary digit arrangement with a line cutting through it
fa-binary-slash.functionalityId: disables or clears binary mode; removes or negates a binary data value
fa-binary-slash.intentId: turn off binary display or encoding; clear binary data from a field

fa-binoculars.appearanceId: pair of joined cylindrical eyepiece tubes side by side viewed from the front; double-barrel optical device with two circular lenses
fa-binoculars.functionalityId: activates a zoom or long-range view feature; opens a search or scout mode
fa-binoculars.intentId: look closer at distant details; search or scout for something far away

fa-biohazard.appearanceId: three interlocking circular arcs forming a trefoil pattern around a central ring; symmetrical three-lobed radiation-like warning emblem
fa-biohazard.functionalityId: marks content or an area as biologically hazardous; warns users of a biological danger or contamination risk
fa-biohazard.intentId: identify a biohazard zone or dangerous material; acknowledge a biological safety warning

fa-bird.appearanceId: side-profile silhouette of a small perched or flying bird with a pointed beak; simple avian outline with a curved body and tail feathers
fa-bird.functionalityId: tags content as nature or wildlife related; marks items with a bird or avian category
fa-bird.intentId: browse bird or wildlife content; apply a nature or avian label to an item

fa-bitcoin-sign.appearanceId: uppercase letter B with two short horizontal strokes through the vertical stem at the top and bottom; stylized currency letterform with double crossbars
fa-bitcoin-sign.functionalityId: indicates a price or value in Bitcoin; converts or labels an amount as Bitcoin currency
fa-bitcoin-sign.intentId: view or enter a Bitcoin price or value; work with Bitcoin cryptocurrency transactions

fa-blackboard.appearanceId: wide rectangular flat panel resembling a classroom writing surface with a thin frame; broad board silhouette with a ledge at the bottom
fa-blackboard.functionalityId: opens a whiteboard or teaching canvas; displays an editable writing or drawing surface
fa-blackboard.intentId: present or teach using a shared writing surface; draw or write on a collaborative board

fa-blanket.appearanceId: folded or draped rectangular textile with soft layered folds; thick fabric shape with creased overlapping edges
fa-blanket.functionalityId: marks an item as a blanket or bedding product; filters accommodations or comfort items by blanket availability
fa-blanket.intentId: find or select a blanket for warmth; indicate that bedding or comfort items are provided

fa-blanket-fire.appearanceId: folded rectangular fabric shape with a flame rising from or behind it; draped blanket silhouette combined with a fire symbol
fa-blanket-fire.functionalityId: marks a heated or electric blanket product; indicates a fire safety warning related to bedding
fa-blanket-fire.intentId: select a heated blanket or warming bedding; be aware of fire hazard with blanket use

fa-blender.appearanceId: tapered pitcher jar on a motorized base with a lid on top; tall narrow-waisted container sitting on a block-shaped appliance body
fa-blender.functionalityId: tags a recipe or product as requiring a blender; indicates a blending or mixing operation
fa-blender.intentId: find or use a blending appliance; follow a recipe step that requires blending

fa-blender-phone.appearanceId: blender jar shape with a telephone handset merged into or replacing part of the form; appliance pitcher silhouette with a retro phone receiver attached
fa-blender-phone.functionalityId: represents a playful or absurd combination action; tags whimsical or humorous multimedia content
fa-blender-phone.intentId: explore fun or novelty content mashups; interact with a quirky or comedic interface element

fa-blind.appearanceId: stick figure walking with a long cane extended forward at an angle; simplified human outline with a diagonal rod reaching ahead
fa-blind.functionalityId: activates accessibility mode for visually impaired users; enables screen-reader or blind-user navigation features
fa-blind.intentId: switch to accessible or screen-reader-friendly mode; navigate the interface using assistive technology

fa-blinds.appearanceId: set of horizontal parallel slats arranged in a stack representing a window shade; evenly spaced flat strips layered vertically to suggest a closed blind
fa-blinds.functionalityId: toggles window blinds or shade controls; adjusts the open or closed position of a blind
fa-blinds.intentId: control natural light by adjusting window blinds; open or close a room's window coverings

fa-blinds-open.appearanceId: set of horizontal slats tilted or separated to show open gaps between them; parallel strips angled to reveal spacing indicating an open blind
fa-blinds-open.functionalityId: opens or raises window blinds to let in light; sets blinds to the fully open position
fa-blinds-open.intentId: let natural light into a space by opening the blinds; set window coverings to an open state

fa-blinds-raised.appearanceId: horizontal slat strips bunched toward the top of the frame with empty space below; gathered blind panel at the upper portion of a window rectangle
fa-blinds-raised.functionalityId: raises window blinds to the fully up position; lifts the shade panel to uncover the window
fa-blinds-raised.intentId: fully uncover a window by raising the blinds; clear the view by lifting window coverings

fa-block.appearanceId: solid square or rectangular filled shape; thick-bordered or filled cube-like flat block form
fa-block.functionalityId: blocks or restricts access to a user or content; applies a content block or restriction rule
fa-block.intentId: prevent a user or item from interacting; restrict access to specific content or functionality

fa-block-question.appearanceId: square or rectangular block shape containing a question mark; filled cube form with an interrogation symbol inside
fa-block-question.functionalityId: indicates an unknown or undefined block element; opens help for an unrecognized content type
fa-block-question.intentId: identify an unrecognized or unknown block; get more information about an unclear item

fa-block-quote.appearanceId: text lines with a thick vertical bar or large quotation marks on the left side indicating indented quoted content; indented block of lines with a bold left-edge marker
fa-block-quote.functionalityId: inserts or formats text as a block quotation; applies blockquote styling to selected text
fa-block-quote.intentId: quote a passage with visual indentation; format a section of text as a citation or excerpt

fa-blog.appearanceId: speech bubble or page silhouette with horizontal text lines and a small wifi or signal icon; document shape combined with a broadcasting wave symbol
fa-blog.functionalityId: opens or navigates to a blog or post feed; publishes or edits a blog entry
fa-blog.intentId: read or write blog posts; access a personal or editorial publishing space

fa-blueberries.appearanceId: cluster of small round spheres with tiny crown dimples at the top representing berries; group of circular fruit shapes bunched together with star-shaped tips
fa-blueberries.functionalityId: tags a recipe or product as containing blueberries; filters food items by blueberry ingredient
fa-blueberries.intentId: find blueberry-related food or recipes; mark a dish or product as containing blueberries

fa-bold.appearanceId: thick wide uppercase letter B with heavy strokes; chunky letterform with pronounced stem and rounded lobes
fa-bold.functionalityId: applies bold formatting to selected text; makes selected text heavier and darker
fa-bold.intentId: emphasize text by making it bold; increase the visual weight of a word or phrase

fa-bolt-auto.appearanceId: lightning bolt zigzag shape with the letters A or AUTO beside it; downward-pointing flash symbol combined with an auto-mode label
fa-bolt-auto.functionalityId: enables automatic flash or auto-power mode; triggers an automatic lightning or boost action
fa-bolt-auto.intentId: set flash or power to automatic mode; let the system decide when to apply a boost

fa-bolt-lightning.appearanceId: sharp downward-pointing zigzag flash silhouette; angular lightning bolt with a narrow pointed tip
fa-bolt-lightning.functionalityId: triggers a quick action or power boost; activates a fast or instant operation
fa-bolt-lightning.intentId: perform a rapid or high-power action; execute an instant or energized function

fa-bolt-slash.appearanceId: lightning bolt zigzag shape crossed by a diagonal slash line; flash symbol with a line cutting through it
fa-bolt-slash.functionalityId: disables flash or lightning mode; turns off a quick-action or power feature
fa-bolt-slash.intentId: turn off flash or power-boost mode; disable an electric or rapid-action feature

fa-bomb.appearanceId: round spherical body with a short fuse line at the top emitting a small spark or flame; circular explosive device silhouette with a lit wick
fa-bomb.functionalityId: triggers a destructive or irreversible action; warns that an action will permanently delete or destroy data
fa-bomb.intentId: initiate an action that cannot be undone; delete or destroy something permanently

fa-bone.appearanceId: elongated cylindrical shaft with rounded knobby ends on each side; dog-bone silhouette with two rounded nodes at opposite tips
fa-bone.functionalityId: marks content as pet or veterinary related; indicates a bone structure in a medical anatomy context
fa-bone.intentId: navigate to pet care or veterinary content; view bone-related medical or anatomy information

fa-bone-break.appearanceId: elongated bone shape with a jagged crack or break in the middle; bone silhouette split into two parts with a fracture gap
fa-bone-break.functionalityId: indicates a bone fracture or injury record; marks a medical case involving a broken bone
fa-bone-break.intentId: log or view a bone fracture injury; access fracture-related medical information

fa-bong.appearanceId: tall narrow-waisted cylindrical tube with a small bowl or stem attached at an angle; elongated pipe vessel with a side-mounted intake piece
fa-bong.functionalityId: tags content related to cannabis paraphernalia; marks an item as smoking equipment
fa-bong.intentId: find or label cannabis or smoking device content; navigate to paraphernalia-related product listings

fa-book.appearanceId: closed rectangular book with a visible spine on the left and a slightly curved cover; upright bound volume silhouette with layered page edges
fa-book.functionalityId: opens a document, guide, or reading resource; navigates to a book or manual entry
fa-book.intentId: read or access a written reference or guide; open a book or document resource

fa-book-alt.appearanceId: closed book viewed from a slight angle with a ribbon bookmark hanging out; bound rectangular volume with a small protruding tab at the bottom
fa-book-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternative or secondary reading resource; navigates to a supplementary book or document
fa-book-alt.intentId: access an alternate reference or edition; open a bookmarked reading resource

fa-book-arrow-right.appearanceId: closed book silhouette with a rightward-pointing arrow overlaid or beside it; bound volume shape combined with a horizontal arrow
fa-book-arrow-right.functionalityId: exports or shares a book or document to another location; advances to the next chapter or page
fa-book-arrow-right.intentId: send a book or document forward; navigate to the next reading section

fa-book-arrow-up.appearanceId: closed book silhouette with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid or beside it; bound volume shape combined with a vertical arrow pointing up
fa-book-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or promotes a book or document; publishes or sends a reading resource upward in a workflow
fa-book-arrow-up.intentId: upload or submit a book or document; promote reading material to a higher-level collection

fa-book-bookmark.appearanceId: closed book silhouette with a ribbon or rectangular bookmark protruding from the top edge; bound volume with a thin tag sticking out
fa-book-bookmark.functionalityId: saves or bookmarks a reading position or resource; marks a document page for later reference
fa-book-bookmark.intentId: save a place in a book or document; return to a bookmarked reading position

fa-book-circle.appearanceId: closed book silhouette enclosed within or overlapping a circular ring; bound volume shape inside a round border
fa-book-circle.functionalityId: opens a circular or grouped library of books; indicates a book belongs to a collection or cycle
fa-book-circle.intentId: access a curated book collection or reading circle; join or view a reading group

fa-book-circle-arrow-right.appearanceId: book shape inside a circle with a rightward arrow emerging from the circle's edge; round-bordered volume icon with a forward-pointing directional symbol
fa-book-circle-arrow-right.functionalityId: shares or exports a book from a collection; advances to the next book in a series
fa-book-circle-arrow-right.intentId: move a book forward in a workflow or reading list; share a reading resource from a collection

fa-book-circle-arrow-up.appearanceId: book shape inside a circle with an upward arrow emerging from the circle's top; round-bordered volume icon with a vertical directional symbol pointing up
fa-book-circle-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or elevates a book within a collection; promotes a document to a higher category
fa-book-circle-arrow-up.intentId: upload a book to a higher-level collection; elevate a reading resource in a library hierarchy

fa-book-copy.appearanceId: two overlapping closed book silhouettes, one slightly offset behind the other; stacked duplicate bound volumes
fa-book-copy.functionalityId: duplicates a book or document; creates a copy of a reading resource
fa-book-copy.intentId: make a copy of a book or reference document; duplicate reading material for distribution

fa-book-dead.appearanceId: closed book cover with a skull and crossbones symbol embossed on the front; rectangular bound volume with a danger or death emblem
fa-book-dead.functionalityId: marks a document as dangerous, forbidden, or cursed; opens a dark-theme or horror-genre content category
fa-book-dead.intentId: access spooky or dark-themed reading material; mark a document as prohibited or dangerous

fa-book-font.appearanceId: open or closed book with a stylized letter or typography glyph visible on the cover; bound volume with a letterform displayed on its face
fa-book-font.functionalityId: opens a typography or font reference guide; navigates to a typeface or character library
fa-book-font.intentId: look up font or typography documentation; browse a character or glyph reference book

fa-book-heart.appearanceId: closed book with a heart symbol on the cover; rectangular bound volume with a love or favorite emblem embossed
fa-book-heart.functionalityId: marks a book or document as a favorite; adds a reading resource to a loved or wishlist collection
fa-book-heart.intentId: save a book to a favorites or wish list; indicate affection for a reading resource

fa-book-law.appearanceId: closed book with a scale-of-justice or gavel symbol on the cover; bound volume with a legal emblem on its face
fa-book-law.functionalityId: opens a legal reference or law documentation resource; marks content as relating to legal codes or regulations
fa-book-law.intentId: access legal statutes or regulatory documentation; look up laws or legal standards

fa-book-medical.appearanceId: closed book with a medical cross symbol on the cover; rectangular bound volume with a plus or cross health emblem
fa-book-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical reference or healthcare documentation resource; marks content as clinical or health-related
fa-book-medical.intentId: access medical guidelines or health documentation; look up clinical references or patient records

fa-book-open.appearanceId: book spread open flat showing two facing pages with a center spine crease; open bound volume with two visible page panels
fa-book-open.functionalityId: opens and displays a document or reading page; activates reading mode for a book or guide
fa-book-open.intentId: read an open document or book; view the contents of an open publication

fa-book-open-alt.appearanceId: open book with slightly curved or lifted pages suggesting a more three-dimensional spread; splayed volume with arched page wings on each side
fa-book-open-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternative reading view or secondary document; displays a different layout of an open book
fa-book-open-alt.intentId: switch to an alternate open-book reading view; access a different layout for reading content

fa-book-reader.appearanceId: human figure silhouette holding an open book up in front of the face; person outline with an open spread book in front of their head
fa-book-reader.functionalityId: opens a reading mode or reader application; enables focused reading or text display for a user
fa-book-reader.intentId: enter a focused reading experience; open a document in reader-friendly mode

fa-book-spells.appearanceId: closed book with stars or magical sparkle symbols on the cover and a glowing aura; bound volume with mystical decorative emblems suggesting magic
fa-book-spells.functionalityId: opens a spells, magic, or fantasy content library; marks a document as containing magical or arcane information
fa-book-spells.intentId: access magical or fantasy reference material; browse a spellbook or arcane knowledge resource
